mapper.sql: id, guide_id, credit,reason, type, score, report_time, create_time
mapper.select:
SELECT * from report_base_guide where is_delete = 0
and (guide_name like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or guide_license_number like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or credit like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or update_time like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') )

select b.id id, guide_id, reason, type, score, b.report_time report_time, b.create_time create_time,guide_name,r.credit credit from base_guide_report b left join report_base_guide r on b.guide_id = r.id order by b.report_time desc
